description: Style NoteThe Spanish influences in the design details of this sandal is the reason for the Spanish name. Subtle, pastel hues, super soft footbed styling and classic designs with a sophisticated polish, style this pair with kohl-rimmed eyes and an ethno-western ensemble!Product DetailsBlack sandal with forefoot strap that has decorative stitched detailing and an ankle strap looping around the ankle and fastened by a velcro closureMaroon soft footbed with branding on the heelTPU outsole with butterfly shaped grooves and an upraised heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
